hypothesis: In the mixed 1.5 M KHCO3/0.75 M K2CO3 electrolyte (total [K+] = 3 M), operating the reactive carbon electrolyzer with a 5 ms on/15 ms off pulsed-current waveform at an average current density of 249 mA cm−2 will produce a reactor yield higher than that obtained under steady galvanostatic operation at the same average current density.
